chunks.text: ﻿ SUCCESS Program Toggle navigation Home About Research Our Sponsors Frequently Asked Questions Contact Us How Do I Apply? We are no longer accepting applications for the 2016 SUCCESS program. Please check this website next year for more information

check this website next year for more information and to learn about the application process. Is Financial Aid Available? Yes, scholarships are available for students in families who demonstrate need. Please include your scholarship application wit

Please include your scholarship application with your camp application. What Are the Dates of the Program? The program runs June 20th -July 29th, 2016, from 8:30 am - 3:30 pm, Monday through Friday, with the exception of the July 4th holiday. Key

, with the exception of the July 4th holiday. Key dates are: April 1st - Applications due April 12th - Notice of Acceptance/Wait-listing (via email) April 27th - Must confirm acceptance & submit $500 non-refundable deposit April 29th - Notification o

non-refundable deposit April 29th - Notification of Acceptance off of Waitlist May 6th - Waitlisted Students must confirm acceptance of slot and submit non-refundable $500 deposit May 20th - Balance of tuition due ($3050) June 1st - Written notice of

f tuition due ($3050) June 1st - Written notice of withdraw from SUCCESS received before 75% refund June 10th - Written notice of withdraw from SUCCESS received before 50% refund June 17th - Written notice of withdraw from SUCCESS received before 25%

otice of withdraw from SUCCESS received before 25% refund. After this date, no refund offered. June 20th - First day of SUCCESS July 4th - No SUCCESS programming July 13th - Family Night July 29th- Last day of SUCCESS and graduation ceremony Is This
st day of SUCCESS and graduation ceremony Is This a Sleepover Camp? No. Participants commute to the Berkeley campus each day. © 2015 TRUST, UC Berkeley
